yī jiǔ jiǔ bā nián sì yuè wǔ rì

text.transcription: 先(父卞學林/母李淑榮)之?

transliterations.transliteration: Sian hū 卞 ha̍k Lîm bió lí 淑 îng tsi
sin1 fu2/fu6 bin6 hok6 lam4 mou5 lei5 suk1/suk6 wing4 zi1
xiān fù biàn xué lín mǔ lǐ shū róng zhī

text.transcription: 慈母楊桂兰之墓

transliterations.transliteration: tsû bió iông kuì 兰 tsi bōng
ci4 mou5 joeng4 gwai3 laan4 zi1 mou6
cí mǔ yáng guì lán zhī mù

transliteration.div: cí mǔ yáng guì lán zhī mù

trans.div: Tomb of loving mother Yang Guilan
